arts.ttl: Preview: Leeds United vs. Swansea City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Leeds United and Swansea City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Farke: Leeds need 4 home wins for promotion
arts.sum: Leeds United are four home wins away from Championship promotion, according to Daniel Farke ahead of Saturday’s Swansea City clash. For Farke, he thinks that winning all four of Leeds’ remaining home games would secure promotion over the other two clubs, as he discussed the topic in his pre-match press conference.

arts.ttl: Swansea City legend makes feelings clear on Sheehan and says club need stability or face trouble
arts.sum: Swans legend Britton believes the remaining eight games, including a tough trip to title-chasing Leeds United this weekend, will likely be seen as an audition period for Sheehan, and says the former Luton Town man has to now be considered the leading candidate to take the job at the end of the season. With so much recent upheaval, Britton believes the club now needs a prolonged period of stability.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Leeds Now Want to Sign Star who ‘Plays Like Rio Ferdinand’
arts.sum: Leeds United are eyeing a summer move to sign Andrew Omobamidele for Daniel Farke, GIVEMESPORT sources have been told.

arts.ttl: Parker banned: Blow for Leeds’ rivals Burnley
arts.sum: Leeds United will be looking for favours from their rivals in the coming weeks of the Championship promotion run-in, starting with Bristol City visiting Burnley, who will be without Scott Parker on the touchline. Confirmed: Scott Parker handed touchline ban for Burnley v Bristol City

Wilkinson, the second name on the list, brought great success to Leeds around the turn of the 1990s, winning promotion via the Second Division title in 1989-90 before his rapid rise with the club continued into the iconic 1991-92 campaign. Leeds United has been shaped by legendary managers who have left an indelible mark on the club’s identity and success.

arts.ttl: Premier League confirm major summer transfer window change that may impact Leeds United
arts.sum: "Swansea are normally a good possession side who presses high, pretty open game against them," said manager Daniel Farke . The market will swing open for business on June 1 for a special transfer period to assist clubs participating in the FIFA World Club Cup in the US.

arts.ttl: Leeds v Swansea: Farke hints at Aaronson over Gnonto
arts.sum: Leeds team news pre-Swansea City: Gnonto 50/50, Ampadu back in training The big issue was with Willy Gnonto’s ankle injury, missing out on the second half of Italy U21 duty, returning to Thorp Arch for further assessment, which has brought good news in the form of only a minor issue, with the Italian in with a 50-50 chance of featuring on Saturday.
